## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## How it was tested

<!-- e.g. `swift test` passes; `make bundle` builds; verified live in the app. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] `make bundle` builds cleanly
- [ ] Follows the surrounding code style
- [ ] Added/updated tests for any new logic
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal paths committed
- [ ] Updated docs (README / SECURITY.md / `docs/`) if behavior changed
- [ ] If this touches the keychain, hooks, or credential paths, the PR explains any change to the security posture
